privileged_info_summary: The task is a DevOps CI/CD pipeline visualization task. A synthetic Jenkinsfile is created at /home/ga/Desktop/project_pipeline.jenkinsfile containing a realistic multi-stage Jenkins pipeline with Maven compilation, parallel unit/integration testing via 'mvn test' and 'mvn verify', SonarQube code quality scanning, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment with conditional deployment on 'main' branch, and Slack failure notifications. The task requires creating a flowchart diagram in draw.io (version 26.0.9 confirmed as real) saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/pipeline_diagram.drawio and exported as PNG to /home/ga/Diagrams/pipeline_diagram.png. The verifier checks for tool labels (maven, sonarqube, docker, kubernetes, slack) and logic labels (unit, integration, main, branch) in the diagram content.
